author: TapeTida
title: Looking for artist for Rogue Trader portrait
content: (Owlcat's Rogue Trader) Looking for an artist who can draw a figure of a 32-35 yo. man for my Rogue Trader's in-game portrait. And the style close/similar to official arts. #artcommission #commissionsopen #commission #LookingForArtist #Warhammer40k

title: Looking for artist for funny community art
